author: aquariouseworkman
name: Mixed Quant (int6 blocks + int8 embeddings) + Sliding Window Eval, val_bpb=1.1630
blurb: 3x MLP expansion with mixed-precision quantization: int6 per-row (31 levels) on STE-protected block weights, int8 per-row (127 levels) on embedding, zlib-9 compression, sliding window evaluation at stride=64.
